latestPosts.caption:
The Luxury Move-In Experience by Organizing Spaces By Kim

At Organizing Spaces By Kim, we don’t just organize homes, we curate & manage luxury moves from start to finish.

Moving doesn’t have to feel chaotic. With our concierge moving services, your transition becomes seamless, elevated & even exciting!!

We thoughtfully handle every detail so your life never skips a beat.

Imagine walking into your new home just days after your move, no boxes in sight, every space beautifully organized & everything intentionally placed & ready to be lived in and enjoyed.

Our Full-Service Concierge Moving Experience Includes:

• New home consultation and a customized organizational product design plan
• Pre-move decluttering and preparation
• Coordination with movers and trusted vendors for a fully streamlined experience
• Professional packing with intentional labeling systems
• Full moving day management
• Complete home unpacking
• Aesthetic, functional organization tailored to your lifestyle
• & MORE

Every move and every space is curated specifically for you.

Our trained, background-checked & insured team is known for being some of the kindest & most detail-oriented professionals you’ll ever work with.

With thousands of spaces organized and years of industry experience, we deliver a true white-glove experience, where you won’t have to lift a finger! 

#conciergemove #dallasprofessionalorganizer #rockwallprofessionalorganizer #dallasorganizer #rockwallorganizer

Comment MOVE & you’ll automatically get a DM with a link to these products + more info about our Concierge Moving Service. If you don’t see a DM please let me know. 

⚡️Declutter + Pack + Unpack + Organize⚡️

For your next move, YOU NEED US! 

The Organizing Spaces by Kim team can help you DECLUTTER + PACK all your belongings before your relocation. 

Once in your new home we can UNPACK & ORGANIZE your ENTIRE HOME! What would take you months only takes us days. Yes, every since box will be EMPTY and your items will be stored in an organized fashion. 

I know moving can be stressful but that’s why we take that stress off your plate and just make the magic happen. Your transition from your old home to your new home runs a lot smoother with us around. 😉 

If you just want part of this process (example just unpacking + organizing) that is an option too. Let’s chat about how we can make your next move a great one!

#dallasprofessionalorganizer #rockwallprofessionalorganizer #dallasorganizer #rockwallorganizer #unpackandorganize #movingspecialist #dallasmoving #dallasmovingservices #dallasmovingexperts

Comment SIX & you’ll automatically receive a DM with a link to these products. If you don’t see a message, please let us know!

These are 6 of our favorite products that instantly add function, beauty, and organization to your space. ✨

👒 Cap Organizer
Keeps your hats visible, organized, and ready to grab on the go. No more crushed caps or digging through shelves to find your favorite one.

🧺 Hanger Caddy
A simple game changer! Instead of collecting empty hangers on closet rods, keep them neatly contained in one spot and easy to access after laundry day.

🤠 Hat Stand
Functional and beautiful. Display your favorite hats while helping them maintain their shape.

👔 Belt Organizer
Keeps belts neatly displayed, wrinkle-free, and easy to see. No more tangled piles or forgotten accessories hidden in drawers.

🕶️ Sunglasses Organizer
Protects your sunglasses, keeps pairs together, and makes it easy to find the perfect pair before heading out the door.

👜 Clutch Organizer
Stores clutches upright so they maintain their shape and stay visible. No more stacking, crushing, or searching for the right bag before girls’ night out.

Sometimes the smallest products make the biggest difference. Which one would you add to your closet? 💁🏻‍♀️

#dallasprofessionalorganizer #ClosetOrganization #luxuryclosetorganization

We love taking a blank slate and turning it into a functional, organized space that actually works for your family. This garage went from empty potential to an amazing finished product, and it was the perfect way to wrap up our final garage project of the season!

Garage season is officially CLOSED for the summer, but we’ll be back at it in October. If a garage transformation is on your to-do list, reach out now to reserve your spot before our fall schedule fills up!! 

#dallasorganizer #rockwallorganizer  #garageorganization

From moving boxes to a fully functional, beautifully organized closet in just days. ✨

We unpacked, sorted, created customized zones, styled favorite pieces, and designed systems that make everyday life easier for our clients. What would’ve taken weeks to tackle on their own, our team completed in a fraction of the time.

There’s nothing better than walking into a home that already feels settled, organized & ready to live in. 🤍

Luxury Closet Designer | @rhondaray22 @theclosetdesignfirm 

#dallasorganizer #rockwallorganizer  #closetorganization

#ad Nobody talks enough about the jobs you say “yes” to early on just trying to grow your business 😅

You think it’ll be quick… and then suddenly hours have passed, there are boxes everywhere & you realize you massively underestimated the scope of it all.

Those early experiences taught me so much about boundaries, pricing & what it really takes behind the scenes to deliver a high-end result.

Grateful to have @hiscox_usa behind my business while I continue learning and growing through it all.

Walk in, grab what you need, and keep moving. That’s the goal!!! 👏🏼

Baby AJ B 💙

These boots tell a story… they were my dad’s as a little boy, and I’ve held onto them, believing one day they’d belong to a new generation.

Now the Longoria family is welcoming not just 1, but 2 baby boys, my nephew is due just one month before AJ B. 🥹 We are thrilled! 

Hallelujah for prayers answered & timing that’s bigger than us. 🙏🏾
